series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to loans or collateral enhancement agreements, including, but not limited to, applications, agreements, amendments, supporting documentation, disbursements, reports, correspondence, invoices, financial statements, and other records filed with and related to the agreement.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: three (3) years maturity or satisfaction of all obligations, whichever is later, or unfunded/unsuccessful applications two (2) years date of denial Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. NOTE: Quarterly financial statements may be destroyed when superseded by annual statements. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
